case_title: WEILI YU VS. AMERIPRISE AUTO & HOME INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVEN SHATZ--CLAIMS ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
